name: Chicken Soup, El Mirador Caldo Xochitl
recipeIngredient: 1 17 oz can garbanzo beans, drained and rinsed
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix minced garlic, oregano, and ground clove to form a paste.
2. Bring water to boil in a large pot.
3. When water is boiling, add chicken, salt, and pepper. Simmer for a few minutes.
4. Skim off foam, then add garlic paste, chicken stock base, cumin, bay leaves, and basil.
5. Let chicken simmer until cooked through (about an hour).
6. Remove chicken and set aside to cool.
7. Add zucchini, carrots, bell pepper, onion, and beans to the pot. Bring to boil.
8. Reduce heat and simmer until vegetables are tender (about 20 minutes). Be careful not to overcook the vegetables; you want them crisp-tender.
9. Meanwhile, remove skin and bones from chicken; shred the meat. (Boneless, skinless chicken breast can be used, with cooking time adjusted accordingly.)
10. When vegetables reach desired tenderness, add shredded chicken and heat through.
11. For each serving:
- Place 1/4 cup EL MIRADOR RICE in a soup bowl.
- Pour soup around the rice.
- Top with green onion, cilantro, jalapeno, tomatoes, and avocado.
